zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Mervyn Sulyard Chief Justice of England於1428年出生在英國素福爾可簡頓時，他的父親John Sulyard II28歲，母親Elizabeth Stratton18歲。他於1453年與Agnes Hungate結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1488年3月18日在英國素福爾可維瑟爾登享年60歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可豪利 帕克。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Mervyn Sulyard Chief Justice of England于1428年出生在英国素福爾可簡頓时，他的父亲John Sulyard II28岁，母亲Elizabeth Stratton18岁。他于1453年与Agnes Hungate结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1488年3月18日在英国素福爾可維瑟爾登享年60岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可豪利 帕克。

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Simon , now rare, but more common in the Middle Ages, when it gave rise to the surnames Simms and Simpson.

variants.name: Simon
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Mervyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of Welsh Merfyn , now also widely used outside Wales.

variants.name: Merfyn
meanings: Traditional: from Old Welsh mer, probably meaning ‘marrow’ + myn ‘eminent’; borne by a shadowy 9th-century Welsh king.

variants.name: Mervin
meanings: Anglicized form of Welsh Merfyn , now also widely used outside Wales.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Mervyn Sulyard Chief Justice of England was born in 1428, in Kenton, Suffolk, England, his father, John Sulyard II, was 28 and his mother, Elizabeth Stratton, was 18. He married Agnes Hungate in 1453. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 18 March 1488, in Wetherden, Suffolk, England, at the age of 60, and was buried in Haughley Park, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Mervyn Sulyard Chief Justice of England est né en 1428, à Kenton, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John Sulyard II, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Stratton, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Hungate en 1453. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 18 mars 1488, à Wetherden, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Haughley Park, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Haughley Park, Suffolk, England, United: Haughley Park, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Mervyn Sulyard Chief Justice of England 1428 in Kenton, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Sulyard II 28 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Stratton 18. Er hat 1453 Agnes Hungate geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 18. März 1488 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Wetherden, Suffolk, England und wurde in Haughley Park, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Mervyn Sulyard Chief Justice of England è nato il nel 1428 nel Kenton, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, John Sulyard II, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Stratton, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Hungate nel 1453. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 18 marzo 1488, nel Wetherden, Suffolk, England, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a Haughley Park, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Mervyn Sulyard Chief Justice of Englandが1428年にイギリススフォルクケントンで生まれた時，父John Sulyard IIは28歳，母Elizabeth Strattonは18歳であった。1453年にAgnes Hungateと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1488年3月18日にイギリススフォルクウエスエルデンで60歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクハウリー パークにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Mervyn Sulyard Chief Justice of England(이)가 1428년 영국 수폴크 켄턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Sulyard II(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Stratton(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1453년 Agnes Hungate(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1488년 3월 18일 영국 수폴크 w더든에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 하우그h리 박에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Mervyn Sulyard Chief Justice of England nasceu em 1428, em Kenton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Sulyard II, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Stratton, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Hungate em 1453. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 18 de março de 1488, em Wetherden, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Haughley Park, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Haughley Park, Suffolk, England, United: Haughley Park, Suffolk, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Mervyn Sulyard Chief Justice of England родился в 1428 г. в местности кэнтон, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John Sulyard II было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Stratton, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Hungate в 1453 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 18 марта 1488 г. в местности ветирден, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности холи парк, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Agnes Hungate en 1453. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 18 de marzo de 1488, en Wetherden, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en Haughley Park, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
